prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-ART-TOTE-PAWPATROL-AMZ Product Type: ART_CRAFT_KIT Brand (from catalog): Nickelodeon Existing Title: Paw Patrol 40pc Art Supplies Coloring Books Travel Tote Set Boys Ages 3 and Up Description: This immersive Paw Patrol art kit features all of your child's favorite characters from the hit Nick Junior series. The portable art kit contains 40 items to keep your little Paw Patrol and budding artist busy. The set includes an exciting coloring book, six colorful markers, twelve vibrant watercolors with a paintbrush and mixing tray, six colorful markers, ten crayons, six high-quality colored pencils, a pencil sharpener, and an eraser that all securely fit in the art supplies tote provided. With multiple mediums to choose from, your child will never get bored while on the go with this super fun art kit.

Be ready for any Paw Patrol artistic adventure. This fun art supplies kit can be used at preschool, elementary school, day camps, or for any imaginative adventures with the Paw Patrol pals. Your child can easily keep their art supplies secure with this carrying case craft supplies tote with a convenient handle.

With a multitude of different exciting art mediums found in this colorful craft supplies tote, your little one can unleash their creativity and showcase their own artwork. An ideal birthday present or holiday gift, this Paw Patrol art activity set will provide hours of entertainment. Search Terms: toys for boys art set preschool learning activities stocking stuffers brother gifts holiday gifts birthday presents paw patrol coloring pencils kids painting set boys drawing supplies toddler travel toys stationery set creative gifts for boys Features: - PAW PATROL ART KIT: Chase and his pals are on the case with this super fun Paw Patrol Art Kit! Art supplies included are a coloring book pad, 10 crayons, 6 markers, 6 oil pastels, 12 watercolor paints, a mixing tray, a paintbrush, a gel pen, and a sticker roll, featuring your favorite Paw Patrol characters like Chace, Marshall, and Rubble - FUN ART SUPPLIES: No job is too big and no pup is too small! This Paw Patrol art kit has everything your little hero needs to unleash their creativity art; With so many different types of art supplies provided, little Paw Patrol fans will get to explore different types of art mediums via painting, drawing, and coloring - TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Be ready for Ryder to call for an art rescue! This Paw Patrol art kit from Nickelodeon can be taken wherever your little hero goes; to school, playdates, airplane travel and more, the easy to carry tote with a built-in handle keeps all the art supplies safe and secure when on the go - FINE MOTOR TOYS: Not only a great creative outlet for art, but the Paw Patrol art kit also allows little ones to develop their fine motor skills through drawing, painting, and coloring! Mixing paint, trying to color between the lines, and perfecting their artwork helps with the development of their dexterity, hand-eye coordination, and imagination! - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11.7” x 1.5” x 12.5”; Weight: .86lbs; Color: Blue; Ages: 3 === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Nickelodeon Paw Patrol 40pc Art Supplies Tote Blue

openai.item_name: Nickelodeon 40-pc Blue Paw Patrol Art Kit Tote Set

tokens.name: Paw Patrol Art Kit Tote Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 40 Art Supplies, Coloring Book, Markers, Watercolors, Crayons, Colored Pencils, Travel Tote With Handle, Ages 3 And Up

openai.title_differentiation: 40 Piece Travel Tote, Coloring Book, Markers, Watercolors, Crayons, Pencils, Stickers, Fine Motor Skills
